name: Fried Peas Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the cooked field peas, flour, baking powder, pepper, salt, and curry powder.
2. In another bowl, beat the eggs and milk until well combined.
3. Gradually stir the egg mixture into the pea mixture until just combined.
4. Heat oil in a frying pan to about 3/4 inch depth.
5. Using a spoon, drop portions of the batter into the hot oil.
6. Fry until golden brown on each side.
